title: Cancer couldn’t stop her. Now she’s running the Boston Marathon again.
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Stephanie McHugh, a 42-year-old from Braintree, is participating in the 2026 Boston Marathon for the Patriots Foundation.
McHugh was diagnosed with Stage 3 breast cancer in 2023 and used physical therapy to return to running.
She is running in memory of her mentor, Susan Hurley, and to prove cancer will not define her.

title: Markey presses Meta on facial recognition risks in smart glasses
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Sen. Ed Markey and others express concerns over facial recognition in Meta's smart glasses, citing privacy risks.
Senators demand Meta explain data collection and safeguards for facial recognition tech by April 6.
Meta has not confirmed plans for facial recognition in glasses, amid upcoming protests in Massachusetts.

title: Debate in Quincy over funding for new firefighting gear after current gear tests positive for PFAS
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Quincy City Council delayed a vote on funding $2.65 million for PFAS-free firefighting gear due to health risks.
Firefighters' current equipment tested positive for PFAS, chemicals associated with cancer and other serious health issues.
Council members cited cost, gear durability, and budget concerns for delaying the decision; reconsideration expected soon.

title: The battle over the aging Attleboro Zoo is getting wild
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Mayor Cathleen DeSimone proposes converting Attleboro's Capron Park Zoo into a nature reserve and wildlife rehabilitation center.
The zoo requires $57 million in repairs, with the city already spending $900,000 annually to maintain it.
A transition team, including Friends of Capron Park Zoo, will be formed in July to oversee the proposal's progress.

title: What does it mean to have a partner?
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Colin Wong and Abigail Brown held a last-minute microwedding in Somerville amid a blizzard in January 2026.
Kara Baskin reflects on nostalgia for 1990s communication inspired by FX's 'Love Story' about JFK Jr. and Carolyn Bessette.
Meredith Goldstein questions the use of 'partner' in modern relationships, contrasting it with traditional meanings.

title: After loss and cancer, a Burlington runner keeps moving toward Boston
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Adam Averback of Burlington is running the 2026 Boston Marathon with Team MGH to honor his father.
Averback's father was treated for glioblastoma at Massachusetts General Hospital and passed away in 2020.
After surviving testicular cancer and a severe blood infection, Averback uses running to cope and find purpose.

title: New Patriots S Kevin Byard working out with rumored New England trade target A.J. Brown
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: The New England Patriots reportedly made an offer for Eagles WR A.J. Brown, but it was declined.
Philadelphia plans to possibly trade A.J. Brown after June 1 to save salary cap space.
Patriots' new safety Kevin Byard worked out with A.J. Brown, fueling trade speculation.

title: James Hagens watch begins as Bruins brace for top prospect’s potential arrival
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: James Hagens closed his sophomore season at Boston College with 47 points in 34 games.
The Boston Bruins consider signing Hagens to an entry-level NHL contract following BC's season-ending loss.
Hagens, the seventh pick in the 2025 NHL Draft, may join the Bruins to boost their lineup in the playoff race.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'Is This Thing On?' featuring Will Arnett and Bradley Cooper is now streaming on Disney+.
'Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man', starring Cillian Murphy and Barry Keoghan, is available on Netflix.
The Chuck Norris action film 'Lone Wolf McQuade' can be streamed on Tubi, Pluto TV, Plex, Prime Video, and YouTube.

title: ‘We’ll see’: Alex Cora mum on future with Red Sox
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Alex Cora remains undecided about his future with the Red Sox after his contract expires in 2027.
Cora is content with the Red Sox's current state despite previous losing seasons, focusing on present performance.
Cora could surpass Terry Francona in managerial wins; he needs 134 more to tie for second most in team history.
